title: Roy Tansy, Jr. Promoted to Chief Operating Officer for Ahtna, Netiye’
summary: Anchorage, Alaska – Ahtna Netiye’, LLC is pleased to announce the promotion of Roy Tansy, Jr. to Chief Operating Officer (COO). An Ahtna shareholder, Tansy has held positions with the Ahtna family of companies dating back 30 years. He brings over 20 years of executive management experience in operat...
